name: mapping-demo
description: Meadow-Integration pipeline demo: parse → map → visual map → comprehension → load

scripts.brand: node ../../node_modules/pict-section-theme/bin/pict-section-theme-brand.js --palette forest --display-name "Mapping Demo" --tagline "Meadow-Integration mapping editor showcase" --favicons web/favicons

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

brand.Name: Mapping Demo
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-mapping-demo-filled-light">
				<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#55af3b"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-mapping-demo-filled-light)"><circle cx="37.5" cy="48" r="30" fill="#ddc536" opacity="0.85"/>
					<circle cx="58.5" cy="48" r="30" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.32)" opacity="0.95"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">MD</text>
	</svg>
